visual_description: A person in a dark suit and white gloves rides a bicycle on a curving road with mountains in the background. The cyclist leans into the turn, hands gripping the handlebars, with their body angled forward. The scene includes parked cars and trees lining a street, with sunlight casting shadows on the road.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a moderate pitch and pace, speaking in a neutral tone without any noticeable inflection.
